title: PMWeather: MISC Additions
description: This is an addon to protomanly's weather mod to add many things that do enhance an aspect of progression in the mod made by protomanly!
body:
This is basically a mod I made to add some structures that tornadoes can destroy and spawn anywhere in the overworld so the tornadoes can show their power along with some other tools you can use for many different uses. 

This mod will be updated and luckily most versions are compatabile with low usage of gpu and ram and doesnt hit your performance.

Also theres people you can make with 2 sticks and 2 blocks of wool (red, white, or blue for now)

# npc variants

## Blue
A stationary weak npc who stays in place and looks around.

## Red
An npc that moves around like a player along with opening and closing doors at will

## White
same qualities with red but it can attack anything that attacks it but can start fights with other mobs like skeletons and zombies

## Green (upcoming)
a fast npc that acts similar to the red npc

## Pink (upcoming)
An npc that fears anything and everything
